title: Privileged Account Brute Force - LDAP Server
resolution: Source IP blocked at firewall. Password reset enforced. MFA re-enrolled.
analyst_notes: Attack originated from Tor exit node. No successful authentication confirmed.

title: Suspicious Login - Risk Management User
resolution: User confirmed travel to Nigeria for business meeting. Login verified as legitimate.
analyst_notes: False positive - user was traveling. Travel policy notification process to be improved.

title: Phishing Campaign - Finance Department
resolution: Malicious domain blocked. 3 users had credentials harvested. Passwords reset. Awareness training conducted.
analyst_notes: Highly targeted spear-phishing. Attackers had knowledge of internal project names.
